Mohamed Amine Ben Hamida._note: nameparser's default prefix list doesn't include 'Ben' (Arabic patronymic, e.g. 'son of'), so it split as just 'Hamida'. Confirmed against FIFA's official squad-list PDF (LAST NAME(S) = 'BEN HMIDA').

Nour Bani Attiah._note: 'Bani' (Arabic patronymic prefix) isn't in nameparser's default prefix list, so it split as just 'Attiah'. Confirmed against FIFA's official squad-list PDF (LAST NAME(S) = 'BANI ATEYAH', a transliteration variant of the same compound surname).
